# Phase 10.0.14 Cultural Memory Plan

Status: Planning-only. This plan does not create executable workflows, runtime authority, provider authority, infrastructure authority, deployment authority, autonomous governance, APIs, background jobs, automated ideological-governance systems, identity-manipulation systems, or execution authority.

## Objective

Preserve cultural memory, institutional meaning, constitutional identity, governance purpose, narrative continuity, and identity survivability after human dignity and rights-preservation doctrine.

## In-Scope Documents

- Constitutional cultural-memory doctrine.
- Civilization meaning-preservation philosophy.
- Institutional identity survivability architecture.
- Governance-purpose continuity doctrine.
- Constitutional identity coherence standards.
- Civilization narrative-continuity philosophy.
- Institutional meaning-survivability framework.
- Anti-identity-corruption doctrine.
- Constitutional cultural-continuity architecture.
- Governance purpose-preservation standards.
- Phase 10.0.14 cultural memory summary.

## Validation Checklist

- No runtime activation exists.
- No execution authorization exists.
- No deployment authorization exists.
- No provider onboarding exists.
- No orchestration activation exists.
- No infrastructure activation exists.
- No cultural-memory layer creates runtime authority.
- No identity review bypasses constitutional supremacy.
- No meaning-preservation layer enables hidden execution escalation.
- No cultural-memory framework weakens auditability.

## Review Notes

- Cultural memory remains human-reviewed, auditable, non-runtime, non-operational, anti-manipulative, and non-ideological.
- Identity continuity preserves purpose without suppressing dissent or correction.
- Meaning preservation keeps doctrine intelligible without creating authority.
- Do not include: runtime enablement, providers, adapters, deployment paths, credentials, OAuth, APIs, fetch/axios, Prisma/Supabase changes, background jobs, autonomous governance, automated ideological-governance systems, identity-manipulation systems, or execution systems.
